Thank you Anonymous for requesting the bot!

I haven’t done a Hazbin Hotel bot in a long ass time, but I’m still trying to get these requests out, lmao. Also sorry if I’m taking a bit too long on these, I’m not used to having people requesting still so I’m just trying to get the hang of it!
